meaning: n.T形十字章(古埃及生命的象征)
examples: Egyptians were buried with an ankh, so that they could continue to live in the "afterworld".
The ankh is an ancient symbol which was adopted by the hippie movement in the 1960s to represent peace and love.
They believed that the ankh could control the flow of the river and make sure that there was always enough water.
